texto: Exactly when will you give up?When things will seem out of your hands ?When situations will seem out of your control?Will you try to control them? Or will you let go?Will you give up then? Or will you keep holding on?Don't tell me that I gave up
autor: I didn't.Because I didn't let go
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de I didn't.Because I didn't let go que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Exactly when will you give up?When things will seem out of your hands ?When situations will seem …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, i-just-let-it-be, control, com foco em reflexao.
